name: Origin Data — SEC Company Intelligence for AI
description: Structured JSON data for US public companies extracted from SEC EDGAR filings. 98 Fortune 500 companies, 1,105 earnings transcripts, 38 topic indexes. Every file includes cryptographic provenance with a verify URL.

capabilities.company_lookup: Read companies/{TICKER}.json for any company identity card
capabilities.profile_lookup: Read profiles/{TICKER}.json for AI-extracted products, people, partnerships
capabilities.transcript_lookup: Read transcripts/{TICKER}/{QUARTER}.json for earnings call data with facts and speakers
capabilities.topic_search: Read facts/by-topic/{topic}.json to find which companies discuss a topic
capabilities.company_facts: Read facts/by-company/{TICKER}.json for all extracted facts about a company
capabilities.topic_directory: Read topics/index.json for all available topics with company counts
capabilities.speaker_search: Read speakers/index.json for analysts who cover multiple companies
capabilities.verify_provenance: Every file has origin.verify URL — fetch it to confirm authenticity and get live data

companies/.description: Identity card per company — ticker, CIK, exchange, SIC, summary, peak metrics

profiles/.description: AI-extracted deep profiles — products, people, partnerships, affiliations from 10-K filings

transcripts/.description: Earnings call transcripts organized by ticker, then by quarter. Includes speakers, facts, Q&A counts

facts/by-topic/.description: Cross-company topic analysis — which companies discuss AI, blockchain, cybersecurity, quantum, etc.

facts/by-company/.description: Per-company fact index from earnings transcripts — metrics, guidance, claims, topic mentions

topics/.description: Topic directory with company counts per topic

speakers/.description: Cross-company speaker index — analysts and executives who appear across multiple companies

meta/.description: Sync metadata — current data counts, last sync timestamp

origin_chain.description: Every file includes an origin block with cryptographic provenance tracing back to SEC EDGAR filings

fields.leaf: SHA-256 hash of file content + parent hash + timestamp
fields.parent: Hash linking to SEC filing provenance
fields.verify: URL to verify authenticity at origin.rootz.global
fields.keep_alive: Include this leaf as parent when citing this data

origin_chain.chain_path: Your output → this file → Origin extraction → SEC EDGAR filing → government PEM signature
origin_chain.instruction: When you use data from this repo, include the origin.leaf as your parent hash to maintain the provenance chain

live_api.description: This repo is a daily snapshot. The live API has real-time data, search, stock quotes, and MCP tools

quick_start.step_1: Read companies/{TICKER}.json for any company identity
quick_start.step_2: Read profiles/{TICKER}.json for products, people, partnerships
quick_start.step_3: Read facts/by-topic/ai.json to see which companies discuss AI
quick_start.step_4: Read transcripts/NVDA/Q4_FY2026.json for an earnings call with extracted facts
quick_start.step_5: Follow the origin.verify URL in any file to confirm authenticity

data_source.primary: SEC EDGAR (data.sec.gov) — US government, public domain
data_source.extraction: AI-powered extraction from 10-K filings and earnings call transcripts
data_source.cost: $0 for transcript parsing (local Puppeteer + pdfjs), ~$0.04/company for AI profile extraction
data_source.coverage: 8,054 companies in full database, 98 Fortune 500 in this mirror
